constrainedWithin.description: Tries to fit this rectangle within a target area, returning the result.

contains.description: Returns true if this other rectangle is completely inside this one.

expanded.description: Returns a rectangle that is larger than this one by a given amount.

getIntersection.description: Returns the intersection of both rectangles (the largest rectangle that fits into both rectangles.

getUnion.description: Returns the smallest rectangle that contains both this one and the one passed-in.

intersects.description: Returns true if any part of another rectangle overlaps this one.

isEmpty.description: Returns true if the rectangle's width or height are zero or less.

reduced.description: Returns a rectangle that is smaller than this one by a given amount.

removeFromBottom.description: Removes a strip from the bottom of this rectangle, reducing this rectangle by the specified amount and returning the section that was removed.

removeFromLeft.description: Removes a strip from the left of this rectangle, reducing this rectangle by the specified amount and returning the section that was removed.

removeFromRight.description: Removes a strip from the right of this rectangle, reducing this rectangle by the specified amount and returning the section that was removed.

removeFromTop.description: Removes a strip from the top of this rectangle, reducing this rectangle by the specified amount and returning the section that was removed.

scaled.description: Returns a rectangle with the position and size being scaled by the given factors.

setCentre.description: Changes the position of the rectangle's centre (leaving its size unchanged).

setPosition.description: Changes the position of the rectangle's top-left corner (leaving its size unchanged).

setSize.description: Changes the rectangle's size, leaving the position of its top-left corner unchanged.

toArray.description: Returns a standard JS array with the position [x, y, w, h].

translated.description: Returns a rectangle which is the same as this one moved by a given amount.

withAspectRatioLike.description: Returns the biggest rectangle that fits in this rectangle using the aspect ratio of the other rectangle.

withBottom.description: Returns a new rectangle with a different bottom edge position, but the same top edge as this one.

withBottomY.description: Returns a rectangle which has the same size and x-position as this one, but whose bottom edge has the given position.

withCentre.description: Returns a rectangle with the same size as this one, but a new centre position.

withHeight.description: Returns a rectangle which has the same position and width as this one, but with a different height.

withLeft.description: Returns a new rectangle with a different x position, but the same right-hand edge as this one.

withRight.description: Returns a new rectangle with a different right-hand edge position, but the same left-hand edge as this one.

withSize.description: Returns a rectangle with the same top-left position as this one, but a new size.

withSizeKeepingCentre.description: Returns a rectangle with the same centre position as this one, but a new size.

withTrimmedBottom.description: Returns a version of this rectangle with the given amount removed from its bottom edge.

withTrimmedLeft.description: Returns a version of this rectangle with the given amount removed from its left-hand edge.

withTrimmedRight.description: Returns a version of this rectangle with the given amount removed from its right-hand edge.

withTrimmedTop.description: Returns a version of this rectangle with the given amount removed from its top edge.

withWidth.description: Returns a rectangle which has the same position and height as this one, but with a different width.

withX.description: Returns a rectangle which has the same size and y-position as this one, but with a different x-position.

withY.description: Returns a rectangle which has the same size and x-position as this one, but with a different y-position.
